name: Paperwork
description: At the end of the enemy turn, this character loses HP equal to its Paperwork. This ignores Block.

name: Doubt
description: The next attack made by this character deals 25% less damage. One stack is removed when this triggers.

name: Panic
description: At the start of the player's turn, draw 1 fewer card. One stack is removed when this triggers.

name: Strength
description: This character's attacks deal additional damage equal to its Strength.

name: Poison
description: At the end of the enemy turn, loses HP equal to Poison, then Poison is reduced by 1.
